feat.name: Wake of Devastation
feat.text: Like a kaiju, you leave a trail of destruction in your wake. Your shattering earth attacks gain the razing trait. Whenever you succeed with a shattering earth attack while standing on the ground, the earth buckles under the force of the blow, and all the squares beneath you become difficult terrain. Whenever you critically succeed with a shattering earth attack against a creature standing on the ground in an area of difficult terrain, you pummel the creature into the earth; they become immobilized until they succeed at an Escape attempt against your class DC.

traits.name: Monk
traits.text: Abilities with this trait are from the monk class. A weapon with this trait is primarily used by monks.

feat.requirement: You are in Kaiju Stance and are touching the ground.
